activeRequest: Release Stability Sprint Phase 1 (T-07): consolidate Firestore services and remove duplication
blockers: Residual risk: symlink privileged branch remains skipped on non-elevated Windows test runs.
Residual risk: Firestore user block-state writes use full-document semantics and may overwrite non-block fields on populated users/{user_id} docs.
notes: Release Stability Sprint Phase 1 completed: Firestore user block/unblock writes consolidated in FirestoreService and callers updated.
